Package it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.View.GUI

Class ChooseColorController

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.View.GUI.GUIController
it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.View.GUI.ChooseColorController
All Implemented Interfaces:
javafx.fxml.Initializable
public class ChooseColorController extends GUIController implements javafx.fxml.Initializable
The controller of the scene where you have to choose the color

  • Method Details

    • start

      public void start(javafx.stage.Stage stage) throws Exception
      Initializes and displays the primary stage for the color selection UI.
      Specified by:
      start in class GUIController
      Parameters:
      stage - the primary stage for this application
      Throws:
      Exception - if an error occurs during loading the FXML file or setting the scene

    • setGuiView

      public static void setGuiView(GUIView view)
      Sets the GUI view instance for the application.
      Parameters:
      view - the GUI view instance to set

    • initialize

      public void initialize(URL url, ResourceBundle resourceBundle)
      Initializes the controller upon loading.

      Sets up UI components based on the current player, configures chat options, customizes chat message appearance, and updates the current chat display.

      Specified by:
      initialize in interface javafx.fxml.Initializable
      Parameters:
      url - location used to resolve relative paths for the root object, or null if unknown
      resourceBundle - resources for the root object, or null if there are no resources

    • setTurn

      public void setTurn()
      Sets turn's text based on the current player.
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - if an IOException occurs while sending the message to retrieve available colors

    • setColors

      public void setColors(List<PlayerColor> colors)
      Set rectangle's visibility to true if the corresponding color is present in the available colors
      Parameters:
      colors - a list of color the player can choose

    • blueChosen

      public void blueChosen() throws IOException
      It passes color BLUE as a parameter to the sendColor method.
      Throws:
      IOException - if an I/O error occurs while sending the selected color

    • yellowChosen

      public void yellowChosen() throws IOException
      It passes color YELLOW as a parameter to the sendColor method.
      Throws:
      IOException - if an I/O error occurs while sending the selected color

    • redChosen

      public void redChosen() throws IOException
      It passes color RED as a parameter to the sendColor method.
      Throws:
      IOException - if an I/O error occurs while sending the selected color

    • greenChosen

      public void greenChosen() throws IOException
      It passes color GREEN as a parameter to the sendColor method.
      Throws:
      IOException - if an I/O error occurs while sending the selected color

    • sendColor

      public void sendColor(PlayerColor colorChosen) throws IOException
      Sends a message with the chosen player color to the server and updates the UI accordingly.
      Parameters:
      colorChosen - the color chosen by the player
      Throws:
      IOException - if an I/O error occurs while sending the message

    • addMessageToChat

      public void addMessageToChat(ChatMessage message)
      Adds a message to the appropriate chat and updates the current chat display if necessary.
      Parameters:
      message - the ChatMessage to be added to the chat

    • sendMessage

      public void sendMessage(javafx.event.ActionEvent event) throws IOException
      Sends a chat message based on the user's input and updates the chat.
      Parameters:
      event - the ActionEvent triggered by the user action
      Throws:
      IOException - if an I/O error occurs while sending the message

    • toggleChatMenu

      public void toggleChatMenu(javafx.event.ActionEvent actionEvent)
      Toggles the visibility of the chat pane and updates the button text accordingly.
      Parameters:
      actionEvent - the ActionEvent triggered by the user action
